reforms.description: The Slovak government initiated the Modernisation Programme Slovakia21, which includes measures to improve public policy, particularly in science, research, and innovation. This programme aims to enhance funding for international research projects and support the establishment of regional innovative centres.
reforms.growth_orientation_rationale: Enhancing funding for research projects and establishing innovative centres is expected to boost productivity and innovation.
reforms.status_evidence: The programme has been initiated and is currently in force.
reforms.importance_rationale: The reform represents a significant structural change in public funding for research and innovation.
reforms.source_quote: The Modernisation Programme Slovakia21 includes a number of measures to improve public policy, particularly in science, research, and innovation.

reforms.description: The Slovak government intends to implement the Modernisation Programme, which aims to improve education outcomes by raising participation in kindergarten for socially disadvantaged groups and enhancing the quality of education.
reforms.growth_orientation_rationale: Improving education outcomes is expected to enhance the skills of the workforce, contributing to long-term economic growth.
reforms.status_evidence: The government has announced intentions to implement this initiative.
reforms.importance_rationale: The initiative is significant but narrower in scope compared to the overall Modernisation Programme.
reforms.source_quote: The envisaged short-term measures in the programme include raising the participation in kindergarten for children from socially disadvantaged groups and increasing the quality of education.

reforms.description: The Slovak government plans to introduce a new vocational education and training (VET) Act to enhance employer involvement in vocational education and adapt curricula to better meet labor market requirements.
reforms.growth_orientation_rationale: Enhancing vocational education is expected to align skills with market needs, improving employability and productivity.
reforms.status_evidence: The government has announced plans to introduce the VET Act.
reforms.importance_rationale: The reform is significant in improving vocational training but is part of a broader initiative.
reforms.source_quote: A new vocational education and training (VET) Act is in the phase of final preparation which will introduce more cooperation with employers.

reforms.description: The Slovak government is planning to establish points of single contact for entrepreneurs to facilitate the entry into new business activities, which will streamline administrative processes for starting and running a business.
reforms.growth_orientation_rationale: Streamlining administrative processes is expected to lower barriers for startups, fostering innovation and economic growth.
reforms.status_evidence: The government has announced plans to establish these points of contact.
reforms.importance_rationale: The initiative is significant in improving the business environment for startups.
reforms.source_quote: The Slovak government is planning to establish points of single contact for entrepreneurs to facilitate the entry into new business activities.

reforms.description: The Slovak government aims to improve the framework conditions for e-business and e-commerce by establishing centres that provide information, training, and support services for small firms.
reforms.growth_orientation_rationale: Providing support services for small firms is expected to enhance their competitiveness and foster innovation.
reforms.status_evidence: The government has announced plans to establish these centres.
reforms.importance_rationale: The establishment of support centres is significant but part of a broader initiative to enhance the startup ecosystem.
reforms.source_quote: Establishing centres that provide comprehensive information on the benefits of business and e-commerce can help overcome this obstacle.
